texto: Ancient peoples who lived close to the earth and in harmony with nature recognized the powerful energy that emanated from the moon and governed life on earth. The ever-changing phases of light and darkness created a balance in nature, and people lived in accordance with the moon's cycles and seasons. They observed the correlation between lunar cycles and the monthly menstrual cycles of women, and therefore gave the moon a female identity.
explicacao: Citação de Janet Lucy sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Ancient peoples who lived close to the earth and in harmony with nature recognized the powerful e…” articula reflexao, feminism, cycles em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e reflexao.
